revision.text:
[[ja:千勝社 (久喜市上早見)]] {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Chikatsu Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = File:Kuki Kamihayami Chikatsu Shrine Haiden 1.JPG |location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|qid=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}{{ill|Kuki, Saitama|en|Kuki, Saitama|qid=Q47535|lt=Kuki|1=Kuki, Saitama}} Kamihayami 583 |coordinates = {{Coord|36.07216666666667|N|139.65530555555554|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|qid=Q276944|1=Ōkuninushi}} |Rank = {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q712534}} |established = |main_building = |alternate_name = Chikatsu Shrine, Chikatsu-sama (千勝様) |festival = July 11 『久喜市史調査報告書 第3集　久喜の祭りと行事（87ページ）』　久喜市史編さん室 編集　久喜市 発行　昭和59th year 3月25日 発行 |location = {{ill|Kuki|qid=Q47535|1=Kuki, Saitama}} }} '''Chikatsu Shrine''' (千勝社, Chikatsu-sha) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Kamihayami Shinden 583, {{ill|Kuki, Saitama|en|Kuki, Saitama|qid=Q47535|lt=Kuki|1=Kuki, Saitama}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|qid=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}. == Overview == Chikatsu Shrine was formerly a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q712534}} of Kamihayami Village in Saitama District, later renamed Oaza Kamihayami after the Meiji mergers. As of 1950 (Showa 25), the precinct area was recorded at 293 tsubo (approximately 969 m²).『久喜市史調査報告書 第一集　地誌（192ページ）』　久喜市史編さん室 編集 久喜市 発行 昭和58th year 3月25日 発行 In a 1909 (Meiji 42) consolidation held on July 2, several shrines were merged into Chikatsu Shrine, including {{ill|Sengen shrine|en|Sengen shrine|qid=Q3471785|lt=Asama Shrine|1=Sengen shrine}} (in Honmura), {{ill|Jūnisha Shrine|ja|十二社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūnisha Shrine|1=Jūnisha Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11404811}}, {{ill|Shimmei Shrine|ja|神明社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimmei Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神明神社|1=Shinmei shrines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11590310}}, {{ill|Tenjin Shrine|ja|天神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjin Shrine|1=Tenjinsha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11443279}}, {{ill|Itsukushima Shrine|en|Itsukushima Shrine|qid=Q191763|lt=Itsukushima Shrine|1=Itsukushima Shrine}}, and {{ill|Inari Shrine|ja|稲荷社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 稲荷神社|1=Inari shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q514480}}. Facilities within the precinct include the {{ill|Honden|en|Honden|qid=Q2044994|lt=main shrine (honden)|1=Honden}}, subordinate shrines, a {{ill|Torii|en|Torii|qid=Q234731|lt=torii|1=Torii}}, a stone pillar inscribed with "Musashi Province Kamihayami Chikatsu Shrine," a commemorative stone for "Ise Grand Kagura," a {{ill|Benchmark (surveying)|en|Benchmark (surveying)|qid=Q1161707|lt=benchmark|1=Benchmark (surveying)}} (first order), the Kamihayami Community Hall, restrooms, a storage shed, a water su11ly, pine trees, swings, a slide, horizontal bars, and benches. == Other Chikatsu Shrines in Kuki City == * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} - Located in Honcho 6-chome. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Yoshiba)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市吉羽)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Yoshiba)|1=Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki, Yoshiba)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11405388}} - Located in Yoshiba 1-chome. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Nakazuma)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市中妻)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Nakazuma)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135505735|1=Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Nakazuma)}} - Located in Nakazuma. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Isaka)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市伊坂)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Isaka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135505739|1=Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Isaka)}} - Located in Isaka. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * Kamihayami Community Hall * {{ill|Suwa Shrine (Kuki)|ja|諏訪神社 (久喜市下清久)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Shrine (Kuki)|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q124482372}} * {{ill|Shinkawa Canal|ja|新川用水|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkawa Canal|1=Nikkawa Canal|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11502098}} * {{ill|Shinkuki General Hospital|ja|新久喜総合病院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkuki General Hospital|1=Kuki General Hospital|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11369243}} * {{ill|Kuki District Fire Department|ja|久喜地区消防組合|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki District Fire Department|1=Kuki District Fire Union|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q24895968}} * {{ill|Nansai Agricultural Cooperative|ja|南彩農業協同組合|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nansai Agricultural Cooperative|1=Nansai Agricultural Cooperative|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11407833}} Kuki Agricultural Economic Center * {{ill|Tokyo University of Science|en|Tokyo University of Science|qid=Q1069994|lt=Tokyo University of Science|1=Tokyo University of Science}} Kuki Campus == Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station (Saitama)|en|Kuki Station (Saitama)|qid=Q843719|lt=Kuki Station|1=Kuki Station (Saitama)}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asahi Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 朝日自動車|1=Asahi Motor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11517584}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi and alight at "Kamihayami" (approximately 10 minutes). The shrine is a 1-minute walk south.[http://yahoo.jp/kufEFW Chikatsu Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! Loco Homepage * From Kuki Station West Exit, take the {{ill|Kuki City Circular Bus|ja|久喜市内循環バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki City Circular Bus|1=Kuki City Community Bus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q133711061}}, "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Route," and alight at "Shinden" (approximately 42 minutes). The shrine is immediately accessible. Fare: 100 yen (200 yen for a day pass). [https://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/norimono_anzen/shinaijyunkan_bus/junkanbus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] == References == {{Reflist|2|qq=}} == External Links == * {{PDFlink|[https://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/miryoku/kanko_tokusan/map2.files/map02.pdf "Kuki Station West Exit Course" Sightseeing Walking Map]|qq=}} - Kuki City Homepage * [http://kuki-sci.sakura.ne.jp/midokoro/pg118.html Kuki Walking Map - Ancient Course] - {{ill|Kuki City Chamber of Commerce|ja|久喜市商工会|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki City Chamber of Commerce|1=Kuki City Chamber of Commerce|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17214116}} Homepage * [http://glassesmaiden.blog81.fc2.com/blog-entry-1262.html "Chikatsu Shrine (Kamihayami)"] - Shrine Guda Guda Visit Records Homepage {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Chikatsu Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kuki Kamihayami Chikatsu Shrine Haiden 1.JPG|250px]]
Haiden (July 2012)
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|36|4|19.8|N|139|39|19.1|E|qq=}}|qq=}} |location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|qid=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}{{ill|Kuki, Saitama|en|Kuki, Saitama|qid=Q47535|lt=Kuki|1=Kuki, Saitama}} Kamihayami 583 |coordinates = {{Coord|36|4|19.8|N|139|39|19.1|E|display=inline,title|qq=}} |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大己貴命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}
{{ill|Konohanasakuya-hime|ja|木花佐久夜姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konohanasakuya-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Seven Heavenly Deities|ja|天神七柱命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seven Heavenly Deities|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Five Earth Deities|ja|地神五柱尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Earth Deities|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照皇大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amaterasu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天照大神}}
{{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q382005}}
{{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishima-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}}
{{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|宇迦之御魂命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukanomitama|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウカノミタマ}}『平成19th year 度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ　久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（100ページ）』　久喜市市民大学 発行　平成20th year 2月16日 発行『久喜市史調査報告書 第一集　地誌（192ページ）』　久喜市史編さん室 編集　久喜市 発行　昭和58th year 3月25日 発行 |Rank = {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q712534}} |established = |main_building = |alternate_name = Chikatsu Shrine, Chikatsu-sama (ちかつさま) |festival = July 11『久喜市史調査報告書 第3集　久喜の祭りと行事（87ページ）』　久喜市史編さん室 編集　久喜市 発行　昭和59th year 3月25日 発行 |rituals = |map = }} '''Chikatsu Shrine''' (千勝社, Chikatsu-sha) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Kamihayami, {{ill|Kuki, Saitama|en|Kuki, Saitama|qid=Q47535|lt=Kuki|1=Kuki, Saitama}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|qid=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}, at the a11ress Kamihayami Shinden 583. == Overview == Chikatsu Shrine was once classified as a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q712534}} in the village of Kamihayami, Saitama District (later incorporated as the town of Kamihayami). As of {{ill|1950|en|1950|qid=Q18597|lt=1950|1=1950}} (Showa 25), the shrine precinct measured 293 tsubo (approximately 968 m²).『久喜市史調査報告書 第一集　地誌（192ページ）』　久喜市史編さん室 編集 久喜市 発行 昭和58th year 3月25日 発行 On [[July 2, 1909]] (Meiji 42), several smaller shrines were merged into Chikatsu Shrine, including {{ill|Sengen shrine|en|Sengen shrine|qid=Q3471785|lt=Asama Shrine|1=Sengen shrine}}, {{ill|Jūnisha Shrine|ja|十二社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūnisha Shrine|1=Jūnisha Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11404811}}, {{ill|Shinmei Shrine|ja|神明社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinmei Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神明神社|1=Shinmei shrines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11590310}}, {{ill|Tenjin Shrine|ja|天神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjin Shrine|1=Tenjinsha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11443279}}, {{ill|Itsukushima Shrine|en|Itsukushima Shrine|qid=Q191763|lt=Itsukushima Shrine|1=Itsukushima Shrine}}, and {{ill|Inari Shrine|ja|稲荷社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 稲荷神社|1=Inari shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q514480}}. The shrine precinct contains structures such as the {{ill|Honden|en|Honden|qid=Q2044994|lt=main shrine (honden)|1=Honden}}, {{ill|sub-shrines (keidaisha)|ja|境内社|lt=Keinaisha|1=Setsumatsusha|2=ja|3=摂末社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sub-shrines (keidaisha)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 摂末社}}, a {{ill|Torii|en|Torii|qid=Q234731|lt=torii|1=Torii}}, a stone pillar inscribed "Musashi Province Kamihayami Chikatsu Shrine," a monument commemorating the "Ise Grand Kagura," a {{ill|first-order leveling benchmark|ja|一級水準点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/first-order leveling benchmark|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a meeting hall (Kamihayami Community Center), a restroom, a storage facility, a water supply, and various trees including pine. Playground equipment such as swings, slides, horizontal bars, and benches are also present. == Other Chikatsu Shrines in Kuki City == * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki, Motomachi)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki, Motomachi)|1=Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11405390}} - Located in Motomachi 6-chome. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki, Yoshiba)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市吉羽)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki, Yoshiba)|qq=}} - Located in Yoshiba 1-chome. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki, Nakazuma)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市中妻)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki, Nakazuma)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135505735|1=Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Nakazuma)}} - Located in Nakazuma. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki, Isaka)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市伊坂)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki, Isaka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135505739|1=Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Isaka)}} - Located in Isaka. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * Kamimachi Kamihayami Community Center * {{ill|Suwa Shrine (Kuki, Shimo Kiyoku)|ja|諏訪神社 (久喜市下清久)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Shrine (Kuki, Shimo Kiyoku)|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q124482372}} * {{ill|Shinkawa Irrigation Channel|ja|新川用水|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkawa Irrigation Channel|1=Nikkawa Canal|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11502098}} * {{ill|11 Kuki General Hospital|ja|新久喜総合病院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/11 Kuki General Hospital|qq=}} * {{ill|Kuki District Fire Department|ja|久喜地区消防組合|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki District Fire Department|1=Kuki District Fire Union|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q24895968}} * {{ill|Nansai Agricultural Cooperative|ja|南彩農業協同組合|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nansai Agricultural Cooperative|1=Nansai Agricultural Cooperative|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11407833}} Kuki Agricultural Economic Center * {{ill|Tokyo University of Science, Kuki Campus|ja|東京理科大学 久喜キャンパス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo University of Science, Kuki Campus|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station (Saitama)|en|Kuki Station (Saitama)|qid=Q843719|lt=Kuki Station|1=Kuki Station (Saitama)}} west exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asahi Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 朝日自動車|1=Asahi Motor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11517584}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Kamihayami" (approximately 10 minutes) and walk about 1 minute south.[http://yahoo.jp/kufEFW Chikatsu Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! Loco Homepage * From the west exit of Kuki Station, take the {{ill|Kuki City Circulation Bus|ja|久喜市内循環バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki City Circulation Bus|1=Kuki City Community Bus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q133711061}}, "Rokumanbu/Nakanosone Route." Alight at "Shinden" (approximately 42 minutes), which is immediately adjacent to the shrine. Fare: 100 yen (200 yen for a one-day pass). [https://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/norimono_anzen/shinaijyunkan_bus/junkanbus.html (Kuki City Circulation Bus - Kuki City Homepage)] == References == {{Reflist|2|qq=}} == External Links == * {{PDFlink|[https://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/miryoku/kanko_tokusan/map2.files/map02.pdf "Kuki Station West Exit Course" Kuki City Sightseeing Walking Map]|qq=}} - Kuki City Homepage * [http://kuki-sci.sakura.ne.jp/midokoro/pg118.html Kuki Walking Map - Historic Route] - {{ill|Kuki City Chamber of Commerce|ja|久喜市商工会|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki City Chamber of Commerce|1=Kuki City Chamber of Commerce|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17214116}} Homepage * [http://glassesmaiden.blog81.fc2.com/blog-entry-1262.html "Chikatsu Shrine (Kamihayami)"] - Shrine Guda Guda Visit Records Homepage {{translated page|ja|千勝社 (久喜市上早見)|version=102266251|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:千勝社 (久喜市上早見)]] [[ja:%E5%8D%83%E5%8B%9D%E7%A4%BE (%E4%B9%85%E5%96%9C%E5%B8%82%E4%B8%8A%E6%97%A9%E8%A6%8B)]] [[ja:千勝社]] {{wikidata link|Q11405387}} [[Category:son-sha]] [[Category:Son-sha in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kuki, Saitama]] [[Category:Son-sha in Saitama Prefecture]]
